log: REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:12+3=15 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:18+-2=16 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:13+-2=11 vs DC 16] FAIL!
REASONING: Can't reach melee (45ft). Javelin at Siren — Winged Striker.

--- Siren — Winged Striker --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
